text: Education is the most powerful weapon which you can use to change the world.
author: Nelson Mandela

text: It always seems impossible until it's done.
author: Nelson Mandela

text: The expert in anything was once a beginner.
author: Helen Hayes

text: With confidence, you have won before you have started.
author: Marcus Garvey

text: A people without the knowledge of their past history is like a tree without roots.
author: Marcus Garvey

text: You never know how strong you are until being strong is your only choice.
author: Bob Marley

text: Feast on your life.
author: Derek Walcott

text: What do they know of cricket who only cricket know?
author: C.L.R. James

text: There are no secrets to success. It is the result of preparation and hard work.
author: Colin Powell

text: Worrying gets you nowhere.
author: Usain Bolt

text: One one coco full basket.
author: Jamaican proverb

text: Every mickle mek a muckle.
author: Jamaican proverb

text: It does not matter how slowly you go as long as you do not stop.
author: Confucius

text: The man who moves a mountain begins by carrying away small stones.
author: Confucius

text: We are what we repeatedly do. Excellence, then, is not an act, but a habit.
author: Aristotle

text: Education is the passport to the future, for tomorrow belongs to those who prepare today.
author: Malcolm X

text: The more that you read, the more things you will know.
author: Dr. Seuss

text: An investment in knowledge pays the best interest.
author: Benjamin Franklin

text: Nothing will work unless you do.
author: Maya Angelou

text: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
author: Theodore Roosevelt

text: Live as if you were to die tomorrow. Learn as if you were to live forever.
author: Mahatma Gandhi

text: Once you learn to read, you will be forever free.
author: Frederick Douglass

text: The future belongs to those who believe in the beauty of their dreams.
author: Eleanor Roosevelt

text: Smooth seas do not make skillful sailors.
author: African proverb

text: However long the night, the dawn will break.
author: African proverb

text: The only place success comes before work is in the dictionary.
author: Vince Lombardi

text: You are never too old to set another goal or to dream a new dream.
author: C.S. Lewis

text: Everything negative is an opportunity for me to rise.
author: Kobe Bryant

text: The more difficult the victory, the greater the happiness in winning.
author: Pelé

text: It's not that I'm so smart, it's just that I stay with problems longer.
author: Albert Einstein
